summary_en: 1,500,000 shares (4.59% of S/O), ¥988.5M upper limit, purchased via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-27, reference price ¥659/share. Reason: capital efficiency and shareholder returns.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Purchase of Treasury Stock via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Yushin Company announced on 26 May 2026 that its board has authorized the acquisition of up to 1,500,000 shares (4.59% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for a total maximum of ¥988.5 million. The shares will be purchased via ToSTNeT-3 off-hours trading on 27 May 2026 at or below the closing price of ¥659 per share on 26 May 2026. The order will be time-limited to that single trading session and will not be rolled over to other trading mechanisms or times. The company stated the acquisition is intended to improve capital efficiency and enhance shareholder returns. Results will be disclosed following the conclusion of trading on 27 May 2026.
